### Post by swaroop933 on 2011-05-08
Hi, I have just installed Ubuntu 11.04 . I have problem with NVIDIA drivers. It seems that for NVIDIA driver, I have "This drivers is activated but not in use".

So, I ran 

```
nvdia-xconfig -a
```

and I got a new xorg.conf file which is like this


```
# nvidia-xconfig: X configuration file generated by nvidia-xconfig
# nvidia-xconfig:  version 270.41.06  (buildmeister@swio-display-x86-rhel47-07.nvidia.com)  Mon Apr 18 15:15:12 PDT 2011


Section "ServerLayout"
    Identifier     "Layout0"
    Screen      0  "Screen0"
    InputDevice    "Keyboard0" "CoreKeyboard"
    InputDevice    "Mouse0" "CorePointer"
EndSection

Section "Files"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"

    # generated from default
    Identifier     "Mouse0"
    Driver         "mouse"
    Option         "Protocol" "auto"
    Option         "Device" "/dev/psaux"
    Option         "Emulate3Buttons" "no"
    Option         "ZAxisMapping" "4 5"
EndSection

Section "InputDevice"

    # generated from default
    Identifier     "Keyboard0"
    Driver         "kbd"
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
    Identifier     "Monitor0"
    VendorName     "Unknown"
    ModelName      "Unknown"
    HorizSync       28.0 - 33.0
    VertRefresh     43.0 - 72.0
    Option         "DPMS"
EndSection

Section "Device"
    Identifier     "Device0"
    Driver         "nvidia"
    VendorName     "NVIDIA Corporation"
    BoardName      "GeForce 310M"
EndSection

Section "Screen"
    Identifier     "Screen0"
    Device         "Device0"
    Monitor        "Monitor0"
    DefaultDepth    24
    SubSection     "Display"
        Depth       24
    EndSubSection
EndSection
```

and I reboot but the computer didn't start. So, I pressed Ctrl-Alt-F1 and entered the command line mode. Here, I removed the above xorg.conf file and then I restarted 

```
sudo service gdm restart
```

This means I am not able to install NVIDIA driver but I need it to learn OpenCL. Can anyone help me... Will be indebted to you .... Advanced Thanks..

Hope u guys understand my pain..

### Post by spikoley on 2011-05-08
It is a [bug]("https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/jockey/+bug/771788").  Make sure you update the bug, it will let them know it is widespread.

---

### Post by swaroop933 on 2011-05-09
Hi may I know whats the bug.. Is it the problem with the nvidia-xconfig or is it "This driver is activated but not in use"... Kindly reply me how to report the bugs

---

### Post by spikoley on 2011-05-09
> **swaroop933 said:**
> Hi may I know whats the bug.. Is it the problem with the nvidia-xconfig or is it "This driver is activated but not in use"... Kindly reply me how to report the bugs

It is a bug with jockey that effects your video card.  Just go to the [bug]("https://bugs.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/jockey/+bug/771788"), log in or create an account and then mark in the upper left hand corner that it is effecting you.

---
